description_long: A stylized male jogger is depicted mid-stride, with one leg bent backward and the other forward, suggesting dynamic motion. He wears a gray hoodie with a light-colored hood, paired with loose beige pants that have a slight sheen, and gray sneakers with white soles. His arms are bent at the elbows, swinging in opposition to his legs, and his hands are relaxed. The jogger's facial features are elongated and stylized, with a short, dark hairstyle. The clothing appears casual and suited for cool weather, with the hoodie providing warmth and the pants allowing freedom of movement. No visible accessories or branding are present, and the overall appearance is cartoonish and simplified.
description: A stylized male jogger in a gray hoodie, beige pants, and gray sneakers, captured mid-stride with dynamic limb movement. The figure has elongated features and a casual, urban look.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the jogger's gray hoodie, light hood, and the back of his beige pants, with one leg raised and bent backward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the forward-leaning posture, bent arms, and the dynamic stride with the left leg extended backward.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the jogger's elongated face, bent arms, and both legs in a running pose, with clear visibility of the hoodie and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right leg extended backward, the swinging arms, and the profile of the jogger's head and clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: Loose gray hoodie with a light-colored hood, paired with loose beige pants made of a fabric resembling cotton or polyester.
attribute_footwear_type: Gray sneakers with white soles, low-cut style, no visible brand markings.
attribute_running_posture: The jogger is depicted mid-stride with an upright torso, one leg bent backward and the other forward, arms bent at the elbows and swinging in opposition to the legs, and a forward-leaning head, suggesting dynamic motion.
